title: Logistics Planning & Development Assistant [SL]
description:
• Assist in logistics planning, including layout design, space optimization, racking setup, and workflow analysis, under the supervision of the Department Manager.
  • Evaluate logistics operations and suggest improvements to enhance efficiency and reduce costs.
  • Apply Lean principles (5S, Kaizen, Six Sigma) to drive operational excellence.
  • Create and maintain standard operating procedures (SOPs), visual management boards, and performance dashboards.
  • Collaborate with IT teams to support WMS integration during system implementations or upgrades.
  • Contribute to new business setups by assisting with facility layout, workforce planning, and procurement of necessary equipment.
  • Utilize tools such as Excel, Power BI, and SQL to monitor and report on operational performance.
  • Develop warehouse simulation models using software like MS Visio or AutoCAD.
  • Ensure adherence to safety, health, and environmental standards.
  • Support the development of long-term warehouse strategies in line with business growth objectives.
  • Coordinate with internal teams and external vendors during planning and execution phases.
  • Perform feasibility assessments on-site and conduct reviews after deployment to ensure effectiveness.
  • Define key performance indicators (KPIs) and deliver insights through performance dashboards.
  • Promote a culture of continuous improvement through team engagement and routine SOP evaluations.
  • Assess and recommend suitable automation technologies and digital solutions for warehouse operations.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Industrial Engineering, Logistics, or a related field.
  • Preferable 3–5 years of experience in logistics planning, warehouse design, or supply chain operations. Hands-on involvement in warehouse setup, layout design, and process flow mapping
  • Prior experience focusing on contract logistics and operational improvements (Lean, cost reduction, 5S, visual boards).
  • Proficient in MS Visio, AutoCAD or similar design/layout tools will be added advantages.
  • Strong knowledge of ERP (SAP/Oracle) and Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) will be added advantages.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.
